areas.name: Market
areas.note: Market screen panels, universe table, and market chart cells/grid.

areas.name: Signals
areas.note: Pyrus Signals overlay configuration surface. (Only the .tsx path exists in the tree; listed once.)

areas.name: Trade
areas.note: Trade workspace: ticket, chain, L2, positions, greeks, payoff.

areas.name: Account
areas.note: Account/portfolio position management and portfolio pulse zone.

areas.name: Research
areas.note: Research screen plus the research-specific charting frame/surface/widgets.

areas.name: Algo
areas.note: Algo monitoring sidebar surface (algo-specific despite being a sidebar).

areas.name: Diagnostics & Settings
areas.note: Crash/diagnostics, chart parity lab, latency and memory-pressure debug strips.

areas.name: Global Chrome & Shared Primitives
areas.note: App bootstrap, brand/loaders, neural overlays, platform primitives, signal-language glyphs, ui primitives, shared charting frames/toolbars, and header/nav/shell/router/provider/mobile-sheet chrome.

findings.old_pattern: tabsRowStyle + tabButtonStyle: (['inputs','style','visibility']).map(tab => <button style={tabButtonStyle(theme, active)}>) — active tab hand-styled with border/bg accent alpha
findings.canonical_replacement: SegmentedControl (platform primitive) for the Inputs/Style/Visibility tab switcher
findings.doctrine_rule: SegmentedControl replaces raw toggle/tab styling; hand-rolling a canonical primitive = old style

findings.old_pattern: raw <select ... style={inputStyle(theme)}> repeated for line style / MTF / dashboard / key-level dropdowns (also lines 922, 940, 1102, 1127, 1134, 1141)
findings.canonical_replacement: Select primitive
findings.doctrine_rule: Select replaces raw <select> styling

findings.old_pattern: inputStyle() + raw <input type=text/number> (NumericSettingInput, ColorControl text field lines 443/472) hand-styled with border/bg/padding
findings.canonical_replacement: TextField primitive
findings.doctrine_rule: TextField replaces raw <input> styling

findings.old_pattern: checkboxStyle() + raw <input type=checkbox> toggles used ~20x for boolean visibility settings
findings.canonical_replacement: canonical toggle/SegmentedControl or shared Checkbox primitive
findings.doctrine_rule: raw input/toggle styling should use canonical form primitives

findings.old_pattern: swatchStyle: border: '1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.15)' — hardcoded white-alpha border ignoring theme.border
findings.canonical_replacement: border: `1px solid ${theme.border}`
findings.doctrine_rule: neutral metadata border = theme token; raw color literal breaks in light theme

findings.old_pattern: color: "#86837D" hardcoded hex for swing-marker legend swatch
findings.canonical_replacement: theme.textMuted (or the actual settings marker color token)
findings.doctrine_rule: raw hex literal instead of theme/semantic token

findings.old_pattern: resolveSolidHex fallback '#808080' hardcoded gray
findings.canonical_replacement: theme-derived neutral token
findings.doctrine_rule: raw hex literal instead of theme token

findings.old_pattern: headerStyle: backdropFilter: 'blur(10px)' on sticky header
findings.canonical_replacement: drop decorative blur; use solid theme.bg3 surface (surfaceStyle equivalent)
findings.doctrine_rule: REJECT decorative blur/glow layers

findings.old_pattern: BUY: { label: "BUY", color: CSS_COLOR.green, background: activityToneBackground(CSS_COLOR.green) }
findings.canonical_replacement: SEMANTIC_TONE.directionBuy / toneForDirectionalIntent("buy") (CSS_COLOR.blue)
findings.doctrine_rule: SEMANTIC COLOR: blue=buy/bullish; green banned for directional market intent

findings.old_pattern: isBullish -> CSS_COLOR.green (632) and isCall -> CSS_COLOR.green (636) for unusual-flow lane tone
findings.canonical_replacement: toneForOptionSide/toneForDirectionalIntent -> CSS_COLOR.blue for bullish/call; keep red for bearish/put
findings.doctrine_rule: Green banned for directional intent; call/bullish must be blue

findings.old_pattern: resolvedSummary.direction === "call" ? CSS_COLOR.green : direction === "put" ? CSS_COLOR.red : ...
findings.canonical_replacement: toneForOptionSide("c") -> SEMANTIC_TONE.directionBuy (CSS_COLOR.blue) for call
findings.doctrine_rule: blue=call/bullish; green banned for directional intent

findings.old_pattern: call share bar span: background: hasFlow ? CSS_COLOR.green : ... (put bar red at 261) — hand-rolled two-color call/put split bar
findings.canonical_replacement: SpreadGauge (signal-language) for call/put share; call segment must be blue (directionBuy), not green
findings.doctrine_rule: Green banned for directional intent + hand-rolls SpreadGauge primitive

findings.old_pattern: const tone = toneForFinancialDelta(sector.net) where net = calls - puts; applied to bar fill (96) and value (103) -> green for positive (bullish) net flow
findings.canonical_replacement: toneForDirectionalIntent(sector.net >= 0 ? "bullish" : "bearish") (blue/red), matching MarketUniverseTable FlowHeatCell
findings.doctrine_rule: net call-put flow is directional intent; green banned for direction (must be blue)

findings.old_pattern: {row.net >= 0 ? "▲" : "▼"} {fmtM(...)} — raw unicode arrow direction encoder
findings.canonical_replacement: BigDirectionGlyph / signal-language directional glyph
findings.doctrine_rule: custom ▲▼ direction encoders should use signal-language glyph primitives

findings.old_pattern: hand-rolled loading skeleton built from multiple <span className="ra-skeleton-shimmer"> blocks (104,125,134,144,154)
findings.canonical_replacement: Skeleton primitive (already used in MarketUniverseTable) / ChartSkeleton
findings.doctrine_rule: Skeleton primitive replaces hand-rolled shimmer loaders

findings.old_pattern: raw <input> combobox with inline background:CSS_COLOR.bg1, border, padding, borderRadius styling
findings.canonical_replacement: TextField / Select primitive styling (keep combobox ARIA)
findings.doctrine_rule: TextField/Select replace raw <input> styling

findings.old_pattern: const gridResizeIdleColor = "rgba(166, 174, 182, 0.38)"; gridResizeHoverColor = "rgba(196, 203, 210, 0.74)"
findings.canonical_replacement: CSS_COLOR token via cssColorMix(CSS_COLOR.textMuted, ..)/cssColorAlpha
findings.doctrine_rule: raw color literals should use CSS_COLOR tokens

findings.old_pattern: boxShadow: `0 0 12px rgba(91,140,255,0.35)` / `0 0 14px rgba(91,140,255,0.4)` (1899) hardcoded blue glow layers on selection
findings.canonical_replacement: cssColorMix(CSS_COLOR.accent, ..) for focus ring; avoid decorative glow literal
findings.doctrine_rule: raw hex/rgba color literals + glow decoration should use accent token

findings.old_pattern:
No open positions
— bare centered empty text
findings.canonical_replacement: <DataUnavailableState .../> (already imported and used at lines 2042/2236 for history/orders tabs in this same file)
findings.doctrine_rule: State coverage: empty states need context + recovery via DataUnavailableState, never bare 'No items found'; also inconsistent with sibling tabs in same file

findings.old_pattern: <svg width="100%" height={H} viewBox=... > (P&L payoff chart) with no aria-label / role / aria-hidden anywhere in file
findings.canonical_replacement: Add role="img" + aria-label describing the payoff (or aria-hidden if paired with a text summary), per chart a11y primitive convention
findings.doctrine_rule: A11Y: charts need aria-label or explicit decorative-hidden

findings.old_pattern: three raw <button> OPEN/HIST/ORDERS with inline color: tab===... ? text : textMuted and borderBottom: 2px solid accent/transparent toggle styling
findings.canonical_replacement: SegmentedControl (or canonical tab primitive) from primitives.jsx
findings.doctrine_rule: SegmentedControl replaces raw toggle/tab styling hand-rolled with inline active-state color + underline

findings.old_pattern: <div style={{ background: cssColorMix(CSS_COLOR.amber,7), border: 1px solid cssColorMix(CSS_COLOR.amber,21), color: CSS_COLOR.amber }}> gateway notice
findings.canonical_replacement: StatusPill/Badge or surfaceStyle()/Card notice primitive with amber tone
findings.doctrine_rule: Pill/Badge/StatusPill + surfaceStyle() replace hand-rolled inline bg/border status surfaces (semantic amber tone is correct)

findings.old_pattern: info.chg >= 0 ? "▲ +" : "▼ -" custom triangle direction arrows in a template string for the quote price-change
findings.canonical_replacement: signal-language direction glyph (e.g. BigDirectionGlyph/VerdictGlyph) or Icon primitive
findings.doctrine_rule: Custom ▲▼ direction encoders should use signal-language glyph primitives (color green/red here is acceptable gain/loss, not directional buy intent)

findings.old_pattern: two centered amber text divs ('IBKR is configured, but live positions stay hidden...' / '...no IBKR account is active yet') as partial-state messages
findings.canonical_replacement: DataUnavailableState with context + recovery affordance (amber tone)
findings.doctrine_rule: State coverage: partial/blocked states should use the DataUnavailableState primitive with recovery, not bare centered text

findings.old_pattern: raw <input type="number"> with hand-rolled inline style (height/padding/border/bg/borderRadius/color) plus a separate <label> caption at L300-311 and a manual hint/error line at L337-361 showing distance/risk or wrongSide message
findings.canonical_replacement: TextField primitive (exports label, hint, error, type, leadingIcon/trailingNode) — replaces the whole label+input+hint/error block; pass error={wrongSide ? wrongSideMessage : undefined} and hint for the Distance/Risk line
findings.doctrine_rule: SegmentedControl / TextField / Select -> replace raw <input>/<select> styling

findings.old_pattern: dialog panel hand-rolls surface: background: CSS_COLOR.bg1, border: 1px solid cssColorMix(tone,33), borderRadius: dim(RADII.md), boxShadow: ELEVATION.lg
findings.canonical_replacement: surfaceStyle({ level: 1, elevation: 'lg', accent: tone }) or Card — the canonical surface helper replaces inline bg/border/boxShadow composition
findings.doctrine_rule: surfaceStyle() / Card / SurfacePanel -> replaces inline bg-/border-/shadow- surface styling

findings.old_pattern: context info panel nested inside the dialog hand-rolls an inset surface: background: CSS_COLOR.bg0, border: 1px solid CSS_COLOR.borderLight, borderRadius: dim(RADII.sm)
findings.canonical_replacement: surfaceStyle({ level: 0 }) / SurfacePanel for the inset metadata panel instead of duplicating inline surface styling inside the dialog surface
findings.doctrine_rule: surfaceStyle() / SurfacePanel -> replaces inline surface styling and surface-in-surface nesting

findings.old_pattern: QuoteStrip maps each quote item to an ad-hoc bordered KPI tile: <div style={{padding, border: 1px solid cssColorMix(item.tone||border,...), borderRadius: RADII.xs, background: item.tone?cssColorMix(item.tone,7):bg0}}> with a manual label div + value div
findings.canonical_replacement: MetricChip (label/value/tone) or StatTile — the canonical metric-chip/KPI-tile primitive replaces this hand-rolled label+value bordered tile
findings.doctrine_rule: Pill / Badge / StatusPill / MetricChip and StatTile -> replace ad-hoc status/label/metric tiles

findings.old_pattern: <Swatch color={CSS_COLOR.green} label="Call-heavy" />
findings.canonical_replacement: CSS_COLOR.blue
findings.doctrine_rule: SEMANTIC COLOR: blue=call/bullish; green is BANNED for directional market intent

findings.old_pattern: to={`${cssColorMix(CSS_COLOR.green, 80)}`} (red→green Magnitude gradient encoding put↔call)
findings.canonical_replacement: cssColorMix(CSS_COLOR.blue, 80) so the directional magnitude ramp runs red(put)→neutral→blue(call)
findings.doctrine_rule: SEMANTIC COLOR: directional market intent must use blue not green; the whole gradient encodes call vs put direction

findings.old_pattern: buyXL/buyL/buyM/buyS donut segments = rgba(CSS_COLOR.green, ...)
findings.canonical_replacement: rgba(SEMANTIC_TONE.directionBuy / CSS_COLOR.blue, ...) for buy/inflow segments
findings.doctrine_rule: SEMANTIC COLOR: blue=buy/inflow; green banned for directional market intent. Use toneForOptionSide/toneForDirectionalIntent -> directionBuy

findings.old_pattern: fill={net >= 0 ? CSS_COLOR.green : CSS_COLOR.red} for NET order flow value
findings.canonical_replacement: net inflow -> CSS_COLOR.blue (SEMANTIC_TONE.directionBuy); net outflow -> CSS_COLOR.red
findings.doctrine_rule: Net order flow is directional market intent (buy vs sell); green banned for direction, buy=blue

findings.old_pattern: SizeBucketRow buy value span color: CSS_COLOR.green and buy bar background: CSS_COLOR.green (line 128)
findings.canonical_replacement: buy side -> CSS_COLOR.blue (SEMANTIC_TONE.directionBuy); keep sell red
findings.doctrine_rule: blue=buy/inflow; green banned for directional buy encoding

findings.old_pattern: sentimentScore > 0 ? CSS_COLOR.green : sentimentScore < 0 ? CSS_COLOR.red : textDim for bullish/bearish sentiment text
findings.canonical_replacement: map directional sentiment via toneForDirectionalIntent -> SEMANTIC_TONE.directionBuy (blue) for bullish, directionSell (red) for bearish
findings.doctrine_rule: Bullish sentiment is directional market intent; green banned, bullish=blue

findings.old_pattern: backgroundImage: `radial-gradient(circle at 20% 50%, ...accent 0.02...), radial-gradient(circle at 80% 20%, ...blue 0.015...)` on the research-screen root
findings.canonical_replacement: Remove the decorative orb layer; use a flat surfaceStyle()/SurfacePanel background
findings.doctrine_rule: REJECT: decorative gradient/orb/blob/glow layers

findings.old_pattern: absolutely-positioned height:200 div with `radial-gradient(ellipse at 30% -30%, accent14 ...), radial-gradient(ellipse at 90% 20%, blue 0.03 ...)` glow behind header
findings.canonical_replacement: Delete the decorative glow div; header should sit on a plain surface
findings.doctrine_rule: REJECT: decorative gradient/orb/blob/glow layers

findings.old_pattern: {t.dir === 'up' ? '▲' : '▼'}
findings.canonical_replacement: signal-language VerdictGlyph / BigDirectionGlyph for the up/down encoding
findings.doctrine_rule: Custom ▲▼ direction encoders must use signal-language primitives; color must not be the only cue

findings.old_pattern: {periodReturn >= 0 ? '▲' : '▼'} inside the period-return pill
findings.canonical_replacement: signal-language direction glyph (VerdictGlyph) instead of raw ▲/▼
findings.doctrine_rule: Custom ▲▼ direction encoders must use signal-language primitives

findings.old_pattern: inline-flex span with padding sp('3px 10px'), borderRadius RADII.lg, background toneAlpha(green/red,0.10), color retColor — hand-rolled return chip
findings.canonical_replacement: MetricChip / Pill primitive with directional tone
findings.doctrine_rule: Hand-rolling Pill/MetricChip (rounded padded bg/fg status chip)

findings.old_pattern: hand-rolled status pill: inline-flex span (padding sp('2px 8px'), borderRadius, bg/fg) + 5px pulsing status dot with animation 'researchObservatoryPulse ... infinite'
findings.canonical_replacement: StatusPill primitive (live/error/pending states) with its canonical status dot
findings.doctrine_rule: Hand-rolling StatusPill; infinite pulse motion lacks prefers-reduced-motion guard

findings.old_pattern: inline KPI tile: div style={{background: CSS_COLOR.bg1, border: `1px solid ${CSS_COLOR.border}`, borderRadius: RADII.sm, padding}} with label + value + spark
findings.canonical_replacement: StatTile primitive (or surfaceStyle()/Card) for the KPI tile
findings.doctrine_rule: Ad-hoc KPI tile + inline surface styling instead of StatTile / surfaceStyle()

findings.old_pattern: loading placeholder divs with `linear-gradient(90deg, text0.025 ... text0.055 ... )`, backgroundSize 220px, animation 'shimmer 1.6s linear infinite'
findings.canonical_replacement: Skeleton / ChartSkeleton primitive for the loading state
findings.doctrine_rule: Bare hand-rolled shimmer loader instead of Skeleton/ChartSkeleton; infinite shimmer ignores prefers-reduced-motion

findings.old_pattern: icon: '◆' in FALLBACK_THEME (unicode glyph used as theme icon)
findings.canonical_replacement: Icon primitive with a named affordance/status icon
findings.doctrine_rule: Raw emoji/unicode glyph used as decoration instead of Icon primitive

findings.old_pattern: color: #2962ff; (raw hardcoded blue accent) alongside #16151A/#86837D/#ffffff literals in the widget stylesheet
findings.canonical_replacement: Reference the platform accent/CSS token instead of raw hex where the widget chrome allows it
findings.doctrine_rule: HUNT MARKER: raw hex color literals instead of design tokens

findings.old_pattern: const SignalActionStatusPill = ... <span style={{ display:'inline-flex', borderRadius: dim(RADII.pill), border: `1px solid ${cssColorAlpha(tone,'44')}`, background: cssColorAlpha(tone,'18'), color: tone, ...ready glow }}>
findings.canonical_replacement: StatusPill (from components/platform/primitives.jsx) with tone + optional glow, composing VerdictGlyph as the leading icon
findings.doctrine_rule: Pill/StatusPill primitive replaces hand-rolled rounded-full tone-tinted status chips

findings.old_pattern: const SignalActionMetaCell = ... <span style={{ display:'grid', border: `1px solid ${CSS_COLOR.borderLight}`, borderRadius: dim(RADII.xs), background: CSS_COLOR.bg1, ... }}> uppercase label + toned value
findings.canonical_replacement: MetricChip (from components/platform/primitives.jsx) for the label+value metric cell
findings.doctrine_rule: MetricChip primitive replaces ad-hoc label/value metric chips with inline surface styling

findings.old_pattern: local const THEME = { bg0:"#16151A", border:"#2F2E35", text:"#F2EFE9", green:"#4FB286", red:"#EA5E5B", amber:"#D9A864", accent:"#E08F76", ... }
findings.canonical_replacement: Import CSS_COLOR / RADII / textSize from ../../lib/uiTokens.jsx (the canonical token module already used by the sibling platform widgets) instead of re-declaring a raw-hex palette.
findings.doctrine_rule: HUNT MARKERS: raw hex (#rrggbb) literals; canonical tokens live in uiTokens/primitives, not per-file THEME copies

findings.old_pattern: ["desktop","narrow"].map((mode)=> <button ... aria-pressed={active} style={{...BUTTON_BASE, background: active?THEME.amber:THEME.bg3, ...}}>) — hand-rolled mutually-exclusive toggle group
findings.canonical_replacement: SegmentedControl from components/platform/primitives.jsx (single-select mode switch is exactly its job).
findings.doctrine_rule: CANONICAL PRIMITIVES: SegmentedControl replaces raw toggle/button styling

findings.old_pattern: color: active ? "#16151A" : THEME.textDim
findings.canonical_replacement: CSS_COLOR.bg0 token (the same #16151A already defined as THEME.bg0) rather than an inline raw hex literal.
findings.doctrine_rule: HUNT MARKERS: raw hex (#rrggbb) literal inline

findings.old_pattern: const LevelPill = ({level}) => {level}
findings.canonical_replacement: StatusPill / Pill from components/platform/primitives.jsx (operational green/amber/red level is a canonical status pill), passing the pressure level as tone.
findings.doctrine_rule: CANONICAL PRIMITIVES: StatusPill/Pill replaces raw <span> rounded status chips

findings.old_pattern:
Status: {latestDiagnostics?.status || "loading"}
Severity: {latestDiagnostics?.severity || "unknown"}
— operational status/severity rendered as bare text
findings.canonical_replacement: StatusPill / SeverityRail for status+severity; however this is a deliberately dependency-free root crash boundary (must render when the primitives module may be part of the crash), so a self-contained fallback is defensible — treat as low-priority.
findings.doctrine_rule: STATE COVERAGE / CANONICAL PRIMITIVES: operational status+severity should use StatusPill/SeverityRail, not bare text

findings.old_pattern: const buttonStyle = { border:"1px solid rgba(232,229,222,0.24)", background:"#232227", color:"#F2EFE9", padding:"7px 11px", ... } — hand-rolled button + raw hex surface
findings.canonical_replacement: Button primitive / surfaceStyle() token-backed styling — but the crash boundary is intentionally primitive-free for resilience, so this is acceptable-by-design; low priority.
findings.doctrine_rule: HUNT MARKERS: raw hex + inline surface styling vs surfaceStyle/primitives

findings.old_pattern: StatusBadge: hand-rolled <span> with borderRadius: RADII.pill + cssColorAlpha border/bg + inner <span borderRadius:"50%"> status dot + ra-status-pulse
findings.canonical_replacement: StatusPill (from platform/primitives.jsx) which provides the pill + status dot + active-pulse; drop the local StatusBadge helper
findings.doctrine_rule: StatusPill/Pill/Badge replaces raw rounded-full pill spans encoding status; SignalDots for status dots

findings.old_pattern: MetricCard: ad-hoc KPI tile div (label fs9 + value fs16 mono, accent color) built inline
findings.canonical_replacement: StatTile primitive
findings.doctrine_rule: StatTile replaces ad-hoc KPI tiles

findings.old_pattern: inputStyle() helper + raw <input> (BacktestTradeSearchInput, line 922) styled with border/bg/mono inline
findings.canonical_replacement: TextField primitive
findings.doctrine_rule: TextField replaces raw <input> + inline input styling

findings.old_pattern: cardStyle() returns inline {background: theme.bg2, boxShadow, padding}; SurfacePanel/Card surfaces hand-rolled across the file
findings.canonical_replacement: surfaceStyle() / Card / SurfacePanel
findings.doctrine_rule: surfaceStyle()/Card replaces inline bg-/border-/shadow surface styling

findings.old_pattern: const color = ... : "#ffffff" — raw hex for on-accent button text (PatternDiscoveryPanel uses CSS_COLOR.onAccent for the identical case)
findings.canonical_replacement: theme.onAccent token (already exists; matches sibling file)
findings.doctrine_rule: neutral/on-accent color via token, no raw #rrggbb literals

findings.old_pattern: Empty state: dashed-border div with bare text "No promoted draft strategies yet." — context but no recovery affordance (DataUnavailableState already imported at line 106 but not used here)
findings.canonical_replacement: DataUnavailableState with context + recovery action
findings.doctrine_rule: empty states need context + recovery, use DataUnavailableState primitive

findings.old_pattern: StatusBadge: hand-rolled pill span (borderRadius RADII.pill, cssColorAlpha bg/border) + inner borderRadius:"50%" dot + ra-status-pulse
findings.canonical_replacement: StatusPill primitive
findings.doctrine_rule: StatusPill replaces hand-rolled status pill + status dot

findings.old_pattern: FamilyChip (and sibling label chip ~line 255): hand-rolled rounded-full pill spans with cssColorAlpha tone bg/border, uppercase — encode pattern-family identity
findings.canonical_replacement: Pill / Badge / StrategyTag primitive
findings.doctrine_rule: Pill/Badge/StrategyTag replaces raw rounded-full label/metric chip spans

findings.old_pattern: raw <select> at 1856 and raw <input> at 1887-1941 styled with shared inputStyle const — despite Select already imported (line 44)
findings.canonical_replacement: Select (imported) for the dropdown; TextField for the inputs
findings.doctrine_rule: Select/TextField replace raw <select>/<input> + inline styling

findings.old_pattern: cardStyle const {bg2,border,radius,padding} + SectionCard wrapper hand-roll surfaces; nested inside these are further bg0 sub-panels
findings.canonical_replacement: surfaceStyle() / Card / SurfacePanel with CardTitle
findings.doctrine_rule: surfaceStyle()/Card replaces inline surface styling and cards-in-cards

findings.old_pattern: EmptyInline: dashed-border centered div rendering a bare detail string (e.g. "No patterns returned for this study yet.") with no recovery affordance
findings.canonical_replacement: DataUnavailableState (context + recovery)
findings.doctrine_rule: empty states need context + recovery via DataUnavailableState

findings.old_pattern: familyTone(): fast_bullish_reversal -> cyan, fast_bearish_reversal -> amber (bull_confluence=blue and bear_confluence=red are correct, but the reversal families drift off the blue=bullish / red=bearish directional canon)
findings.canonical_replacement: blue for bullish-reversal, red for bearish-reversal (distinguish variants via other means, not off-canon directional hues)
findings.doctrine_rule: semantic direction color: blue=bullish, red=bearish

verified.old_pattern: tabsRowStyle + tabButtonStyle: (['inputs','style','visibility']).map(tab => <button style={tabButtonStyle(theme, active)}>) — active tab hand-styled
verified.canonical_replacement: SegmentedControl (primitives.jsx:1273) for the Inputs/Style/Visibility tab switcher
verified.doctrine_rule: SegmentedControl replaces raw toggle/tab styling; hand-rolling a canonical primitive = old style
verified.reason: Confirmed at line 664-674: three mutually-exclusive tabs hand-styled via tabButtonStyle(theme, active); SegmentedControl exists and fits exactly.

verified.old_pattern: raw <select style={inputStyle(theme)}> repeated (747, 922, 940, 1102, 1127, 1134, 1141)
verified.canonical_replacement: Select (primitives.jsx:1563)
verified.doctrine_rule: Select replaces raw <select> styling
verified.reason: Confirmed 7 raw <select> instances all styled with inputStyle(theme); Select primitive exists at line 1563.

verified.old_pattern: inputStyle() + raw <input type=text/number> (lines 443, 472) hand-styled with border/bg/padding
verified.canonical_replacement: TextField (primitives.jsx:1411)
verified.doctrine_rule: TextField replaces raw <input> styling
verified.reason: Confirmed: inputStyle() at 247 applied to raw text input (443) and number input (472); TextField primitive exists at line 1411.

verified.old_pattern: checkboxStyle() + raw <input type=checkbox> toggles used ~20x for boolean visibility settings
verified.canonical_replacement: none — no Checkbox primitive exists in primitives.jsx; SegmentedControl does not fit independent booleans
verified.doctrine_rule: raw input/toggle styling should use canonical form primitives
verified.reason: Pattern is real (~20 raw checkboxes) but the proposed canonical replacement does not exist: primitives.jsx has no Checkbox/Toggle export, and SegmentedControl is for mutually-exclusive segments not independent boolean toggles.

verified.old_pattern: swatchStyle: border: '1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.15)' — hardcoded white-alpha border ignoring theme.border
verified.canonical_replacement: border: `1px solid ${theme.border}`
verified.doctrine_rule: neutral metadata border = theme token; raw white-alpha literal breaks in light theme
verified.reason: Confirmed at line 302: hardcoded rgba(255,255,255,0.15) border on the color swatch; every other border in the file uses theme.border, and white-alpha is invisible on light surfaces.

verified.old_pattern: color: "#86837D" hardcoded hex for swing-marker legend swatch
verified.canonical_replacement: shared charting dim constant matching the renderer's swing-marker color (NOT theme.textMuted, which would desync the legend from the chart)
verified.doctrine_rule: raw hex literal instead of shared token
verified.reason: Literal is real, but #86837D is the established charting textDim value reused across indicators.ts/ChartParityLab; this legend swatch must mirror the actual on-chart marker color, so theme.textMuted (the finder's proposal) could break legend-to-chart correspondence — needs a shared constant, not the theme token.

verified.old_pattern: resolveSolidHex fallback '#808080' hardcoded gray
verified.canonical_replacement: n/a
verified.doctrine_rule: raw hex literal instead of theme token
verified.reason: Not a UI-surface styling token: #808080 is a data-sanitization fallback returning a valid 6-hex value for the native <input type=color> when the stored value is malformed — theme tokens are inapplicable here.

verified.old_pattern: headerStyle: backdropFilter: 'blur(10px)' on sticky header
verified.canonical_replacement: n/a — functional sticky-header frosted treatment, not a decorative glow layer
verified.doctrine_rule: REJECT decorative blur/glow layers
verified.reason: The doctrine bans decorative gradient/orb/blob/glow layers; this is a functional backdrop-blur on a position:sticky header (with semi-transparent bg3+dd) that keeps scrolling content legible underneath — standard frosted-glass sticky pattern, not a decorative overlay.

findings.old_pattern: {favorite ? "★" : "☆"} (raw unicode star as the favorite toggle)
findings.canonical_replacement: Use the Icon primitive (components/platform/primitives.jsx Icon, lucide Star / filled state) for the favorite affordance, with an explicit aria-label/title on the control
findings.doctrine_rule: Icon replaces raw glyph/emoji used as affordance/status; icon-only controls need label/tooltip (A11Y)

findings.old_pattern: <select aria-label="SnapTrade broker target" style={{height,border,borderRadius,background,color,fontFamily,fontSize,padding}}> (hand-rolled inline-styled select)
findings.canonical_replacement: Use the canonical Select primitive (components/platform/primitives.jsx:1563) instead of a raw inline-styled <select>
findings.doctrine_rule: Select primitive replaces raw <select> styling

findings.old_pattern: inline-styled action <button> with padding/border/borderRadius/background/color tone tokens duplicating the primary/secondary button pattern
findings.canonical_replacement: Use the canonical Button primitive (components/ui/Button.jsx) with its variant/tone props rather than re-implementing button chrome inline
findings.doctrine_rule: Button primitive replaces hand-rolled button styling

verified.old_pattern:
No open positions
— bare centered empty text
verified.canonical_replacement: DataUnavailableState (imported line 77; already used at 2042/2236 in this same file)
verified.doctrine_rule: State coverage: empty states need context + recovery via DataUnavailableState, never bare text; inconsistent with sibling tabs in same file
verified.reason: Verified bare centered 'No open positions' div at 1606 with no recovery; DataUnavailableState is imported and used for the sibling history/orders tabs.

verified.old_pattern: <svg width="100%" height={H} viewBox=...> P&L payoff chart with no aria-label/role/aria-hidden anywhere in file
verified.canonical_replacement: Add role="img" + aria-label describing the payoff (or aria-hidden if paired with text summary) per chart a11y convention
verified.doctrine_rule: A11Y: charts need aria-label or explicit decorative-hidden
verified.reason: grep confirms zero aria/role attributes in PayoffDiagram.jsx; the payoff <svg> at 143 is a meaningful chart with no accessible name or decorative-hidden marker.

verified.old_pattern: three raw <button> OPEN/HIST/ORDERS with inline color: tab===... ? text : textMuted and borderBottom 2px solid accent/transparent toggle styling
verified.canonical_replacement: SegmentedControl from primitives.jsx (exported line 1273)
verified.doctrine_rule: SegmentedControl replaces hand-rolled toggle/tab styling built from inline active-state color + underline
verified.reason: Verified three hand-rolled <button> tabs at 1444-1518 with inline active-color + borderBottom toggle; SegmentedControl exists in primitives.jsx as the canonical toggle group.

verified.old_pattern: <div style={{ background: cssColorMix(amber,7), border: 1px solid cssColorMix(amber,21), color: amber }}> multi-line gateway trading notice
verified.canonical_replacement: surfaceStyle()/Card amber-toned notice (not Pill/Badge — this is a multi-line banner, not a short label)
verified.doctrine_rule: surfaceStyle()/Card replace hand-rolled inline bg/border status surfaces; amber tone is semantically correct (degraded/limited)
verified.reason: Verified inline amber bg/border/color surface at 1533; surfaceStyle()/Card exist in primitives (1882/1894). Corrected replacement to surfaceStyle/Card since the content is a multi-line notice, not a pill.

verified.old_pattern: info.chg >= 0 ? "▲ +" : "▼ -" custom triangle arrows for quote price-change (green/red gain-loss)
verified.canonical_replacement: None applicable — BigDirectionGlyph/VerdictGlyph encode buy/sell SIGNAL direction and verdict, not quote P&L gain/loss; no canonical gain/loss-arrow primitive exists
verified.doctrine_rule: signal-language glyphs replace ▲▼ that encode DIRECTION/VERDICT; a price-change gain/loss arrow is outside that scope
verified.reason: BigDirectionGlyph only accepts direction='buy'|'sell' with a freshness ring and VerdictGlyph is for signal verdicts; neither models a quote's up/down price change (green/red is correct P&L semantics, not directional intent).

verified.old_pattern: two centered amber text divs (IBKR configured but positions hidden until auth / no IBKR account active yet) as partial/blocked-state messages
verified.canonical_replacement: DataUnavailableState (amber tone) with context + recovery affordance
verified.doctrine_rule: State coverage: partial/blocked states should use DataUnavailableState with recovery, not bare centered text
verified.reason: Verified two centered amber partial-state divs at 1558-1592 lacking recovery affordance; DataUnavailableState is imported and used elsewhere in this file and supports tone + recovery.

verified.old_pattern: getSignalLaneTone: BUY -> { color: CSS_COLOR.green, background: activityToneBackground(CSS_COLOR.green) } (actual line 502)
verified.canonical_replacement: toneForDirectionalIntent("buy") / SEMANTIC_TONE.directionBuy (CSS_COLOR.blue); keep red for sell
verified.doctrine_rule: SEMANTIC COLOR: blue=buy/bullish; green banned for directional market intent
verified.reason: Confirmed: BUY signal-lane tone hand-rolled as CSS_COLOR.green (buy is directional intent -> must be blue); toneForDirectionalIntent("buy") returns SEMANTIC_TONE.directionBuy=blue.

verified.old_pattern: isBullish && !isBearish ? CSS_COLOR.green (632); isCall ? CSS_COLOR.green (636) for unusual-flow lane tone
verified.canonical_replacement: toneForDirectionalIntent(bullish) / toneForOptionSide("call") -> CSS_COLOR.blue; keep red for bearish/put
verified.doctrine_rule: Green banned for directional intent; call/bullish must be blue
verified.reason: Confirmed at exact lines: bullish and call branches both resolve to CSS_COLOR.green; both are directional intent and must be blue via the tone helpers.

verified.old_pattern: resolvedSummary.direction === "call" ? CSS_COLOR.green : direction === "put" ? CSS_COLOR.red : CSS_COLOR.textMuted
verified.canonical_replacement: toneForOptionSide(direction) / toneForDirectionalIntent("call") -> SEMANTIC_TONE.directionBuy (CSS_COLOR.blue) for call
verified.doctrine_rule: blue=call/bullish; green banned for directional intent
verified.reason: Confirmed: call direction tone hard-coded to CSS_COLOR.green; call is directional intent -> blue via toneForOptionSide ("call" is in the BLUE_DIRECTION_TOKENS set).

verified.old_pattern: call-share bar span background: hasFlow ? CSS_COLOR.green : ... (253); put bar CSS_COLOR.red (261) — hand-rolled two-color call/put split bar
verified.canonical_replacement: Color fix only: call segment must be blue via SEMANTIC_TONE.directionBuy/toneForOptionSide("c") (keep red for put). NOTE: SpreadGauge is the WRONG primitive — it renders bid/ask SPREAD width, not call/put share; no call/put split-bar primitive exists, so tokenize the color, do not swap to SpreadGauge
verified.doctrine_rule: Green banned for directional intent (call must be blue)
verified.reason: Color violation confirmed (green for the call segment is directional -> blue); but the finder's named replacement SpreadGauge is wrong (it is a bid/ask spread gauge), corrected to a tone fix on the existing bar.

verified.old_pattern: const tone = toneForFinancialDelta(sector.net) where net = calls - puts (line 22); applied to bar fill (~96) and value (~103) -> green for positive net flow
verified.canonical_replacement: toneForDirectionalIntent(sector.net >= 0 ? "bullish" : "bearish") (blue/red) — exactly what MarketUniverseTable FlowHeatCell (line 154) already does for the same calls-puts net
verified.doctrine_rule: net call-put flow is directional intent; green banned for direction (must be blue)
verified.reason: Confirmed: sector.net is (calls - puts) = directional; toneForFinancialDelta yields green for positive, inconsistent with FlowHeatCell which uses toneForDirectionalIntent(bullish/bearish) for the identical net.

verified.old_pattern: {row.net >= 0 ? "▲" : "▼"} {fmtM(...)} — raw unicode arrow direction encoder
verified.canonical_replacement: BigDirectionGlyph (signal-language) with direction + tone override — it renders exactly an up/down triangle for buy/sell
verified.doctrine_rule: custom ▲▼ direction encoders should use signal-language glyph primitives
verified.reason: Confirmed: raw ▲/▼ unicode direction encoder (net>=0 up/else down); BigDirectionGlyph exists and is the doctrine-named replacement for custom ▲▼ arrows.

verified.old_pattern: loading skeleton built from multiple <span className="ra-skeleton-shimmer"> blocks (104,127,138,148,158)
verified.canonical_replacement: Skeleton primitive (primitives.jsx:1714), already the pattern used elsewhere; ChartSkeleton (1756) for chart area
verified.doctrine_rule: Skeleton primitive replaces hand-rolled shimmer loaders
verified.reason: Confirmed: five hand-rolled ra-skeleton-shimmer spans; Skeleton/ChartSkeleton primitives exist and should back these placeholders.

verified.old_pattern: raw <input role="combobox"> with inline background:CSS_COLOR.bg1, border, padding, borderRadius, textTransform styling (style block ~318)
verified.canonical_replacement: TextField primitive for the input surface styling IF it can carry the combobox role/aria-* + custom listbox; unverified that TextField forwards those, so not a clean drop-in
verified.doctrine_rule: TextField/Select replace raw <input> styling
verified.reason: Input surface styling is hand-rolled and TextField exists, but this is a fully custom autocomplete combobox (role=combobox, aria-expanded/controls/activedescendant + custom dropdown); could not confirm TextField preserves that ARIA, so replacement is not a verified clean fit.

verified.old_pattern: const gridResizeIdleColor = "rgba(166, 174, 182, 0.38)"; gridResizeHoverColor = "rgba(196, 203, 210, 0.74)"
verified.canonical_replacement: CSS_COLOR neutral token via cssColorMix(CSS_COLOR.textMuted, ..) / cssColorAlpha (both exist in uiTokens.jsx)
verified.doctrine_rule: raw rgba color literals should use CSS_COLOR tokens
verified.reason: Confirmed: raw neutral-gray rgba literals for resize-divider colors; cssColorMix/cssColorAlpha exist to derive these from CSS_COLOR.textMuted.

verified.old_pattern: boxShadow: `0 0 0 1px ${CSS_COLOR.bg0}, 0 0 12px rgba(91,140,255,0.35)` (1744) and `0 0 14px rgba(91,140,255,0.4)` (1899) hardcoded blue glow on active selection
verified.canonical_replacement: cssColorMix(CSS_COLOR.accent, ..) for the blue glow — it is a functional active-selection ring (not decorative/motion), so tokenize the color, keep the glow
verified.doctrine_rule: raw rgba blue literals should use the accent token
verified.reason: Confirmed as a raw blue rgba literal (accent=#168BFF token exists); but element_type "motion"/"decorative" is a mislabel — the glow is a static isActive selection affordance, so the fix is tokenization, not removal.

verified.old_pattern: raw <input type="number"> (L312-335) with hand-rolled inline height/padding/border/bg/borderRadius/color, a separate caption <span> label (L301-311) and a manual hint/error line (L337-361) toggling color for Distance/Risk vs wrongSideMessage
verified.canonical_replacement: TextField primitive (label, hint, error, type, inputProps for step/min/inputMode/onKeyDown) — replaces the label+input+hint/error block; error={wrongSide ? wrongSideMessage : undefined}, hint carries the Distance/Risk + Current-price row
verified.doctrine_rule: SegmentedControl / TextField / Select -> replace raw <input>/<select> styling
verified.reason: Raw hand-styled number input verified at L312-335; TextField exists (L1411) exporting label/hint/error/type/inputProps that subsume the whole block.

verified.old_pattern: dialog panel inline surface: background CSS_COLOR.bg1, border 1px solid cssColorMix(tone,33), borderRadius dim(RADII.md), boxShadow ELEVATION.lg
verified.canonical_replacement: no accurate canonical primitive: surfaceStyle signature is {radius,border,elevated} with border:'none' and max ELEVATION.sm — it cannot produce a tone-accent border or ELEVATION.lg; a modal dialog is a distinct surface
verified.doctrine_rule: surfaceStyle() / Card / SurfacePanel -> replaces inline bg-/border-/shadow- surface styling
verified.reason: Proposed surfaceStyle({level,elevation,accent}) params do not exist; real surfaceStyle forces border:none + <=ELEVATION.sm and cannot reproduce this modal's accent border and lg elevation.

verified.old_pattern: inset context grid: background CSS_COLOR.bg0, border 1px solid CSS_COLOR.borderLight, borderRadius dim(RADII.sm)
verified.canonical_replacement: no accurate canonical primitive: surfaceStyle has no 'level' param and returns bg1 (raised), not this bg0 recessed well; SurfacePanel is a titled header/rightRail panel, not a bare 2-col metadata grid
verified.doctrine_rule: surfaceStyle() / SurfacePanel -> replaces inline surface styling and surface-in-surface nesting
verified.reason: surfaceStyle({level:0}) does not exist and would yield bg1 not the intentional bg0 recessed metadata well; SurfacePanel is a titled panel, so neither replacement matches.

verified.old_pattern: QuoteStrip maps each item to an ad-hoc bordered tone-tinted tile: <div style border:1px solid cssColorMix(item.tone||border,24), borderRadius RADII.xs, background item.tone?cssColorMix(item.tone,7):bg0> with manual label div + value div
verified.canonical_replacement: MetricChip (label/value/tone) — its tinting (border cssColorMix(tone,21), bg cssColorMix(tone,6), color tone) nearly matches this hand-rolled tile; drop StatTile (it does not tint and defaults to a 108px min-width). Layout adapts from vertical stack to MetricChip's inline label/value
verified.doctrine_rule: Pill / Badge / StatusPill / MetricChip and StatTile -> replace ad-hoc status/label/metric tiles
verified.reason: Hand-rolled tile at L100-138 duplicates MetricChip's tone-tint math almost exactly; MetricChip (L846) is the real primitive, StatTile (L925) is wrong as it is borderless/untinted with a large minWidth.

verified.old_pattern: <Swatch color={CSS_COLOR.green} label="Call-heavy" />
verified.canonical_replacement: CSS_COLOR.blue
verified.doctrine_rule: SEMANTIC COLOR: blue=call/bullish; green is BANNED for directional market intent
verified.reason: Line 56 uses CSS_COLOR.green to swatch 'Call-heavy', a directional (bullish/call) meaning that must be blue; CSS_COLOR.blue exists in uiTokens.jsx.

verified.old_pattern: to={`${cssColorMix(CSS_COLOR.green, 80)}`} (red→neutral→green magnitude gradient encoding put↔call)
verified.canonical_replacement: cssColorMix(CSS_COLOR.blue, 80)
verified.doctrine_rule: SEMANTIC COLOR: directional market intent must use blue not green; the gradient encodes call vs put direction
verified.reason: Line 69 GradientStrip 'to' color is the call end of a put(red)↔call magnitude ramp using green; directional so must be blue. cssColorMix and CSS_COLOR.blue both exist.

verified.old_pattern: buyXL/buyL/buyM/buyS donut segments = rgba(CSS_COLOR.green, ...) (lines 22-25)
verified.canonical_replacement: rgba(SEMANTIC_TONE.directionBuy, ...) (= CSS_COLOR.blue) from features/platform/semanticToneModel.js for buy segments; keep sell red
verified.doctrine_rule: SEMANTIC COLOR: blue=buy/inflow; green banned for directional market intent
verified.reason: Lines 22-25 truly color buy donut segments with CSS_COLOR.green; buy order flow is directional intent, and SEMANTIC_TONE.directionBuy (blue) exists and is already used in FlowScreen.

verified.old_pattern: fill={net >= 0 ? CSS_COLOR.green : CSS_COLOR.red} for NET order flow value
verified.canonical_replacement: net >= 0 -> SEMANTIC_TONE.directionBuy (CSS_COLOR.blue); net < 0 -> SEMANTIC_TONE.directionSell (CSS_COLOR.red)
verified.doctrine_rule: Net order flow is directional (net buying vs selling); green banned for direction, buy=blue
verified.reason: Line 92 uses CSS_COLOR.green for net-positive order flow, which is directional buying pressure (not P&L); blue is the correct canonical tone and directionBuy exists.

verified.old_pattern: SizeBucketRow buy value span color CSS_COLOR.green (line 117) and buy bar background CSS_COLOR.green (line 128)
verified.canonical_replacement: buy side -> SEMANTIC_TONE.directionBuy (CSS_COLOR.blue); keep sell red (CSS_COLOR.red / directionSell)
verified.doctrine_rule: blue=buy/inflow; green banned for directional buy encoding
verified.reason: Lines 117 and 128 both apply CSS_COLOR.green to the buy side of the size-bucket row; buy is directional, so blue (SEMANTIC_TONE.directionBuy) is the canonical replacement.

verified.old_pattern: sentimentScore > 0 ? CSS_COLOR.green : sentimentScore < 0 ? CSS_COLOR.red : CSS_COLOR.textDim for bullish/bearish sentiment text (lines 989-993)
verified.canonical_replacement: sentimentScore > 0 -> SEMANTIC_TONE.directionBuy (blue); < 0 -> SEMANTIC_TONE.directionSell (red); else neutral. (toneForDirectionalIntent takes a token string, so use the score ternary with SEMANTIC_TONE directly)
verified.doctrine_rule: Bullish sentiment is directional market intent; green banned, bullish=blue
verified.reason: Lines 989-993 color positive (bullish) sentiment with CSS_COLOR.green; bullish is directional, so directionBuy (blue) applies. Corrected replacement: use SEMANTIC_TONE.directionBuy/directionSell in the score ternary since the score is numeric, not a token for toneForDirectionalIntent.

verified.old_pattern: backgroundImage: `radial-gradient(circle at 20% 50%, accent 0.02...), radial-gradient(circle at 80% 20%, blue 0.015...)` on the research-screen root
verified.canonical_replacement: Remove the decorative orb layer; keep the flat CSS_COLOR.bg1 background (or surfaceStyle())
verified.doctrine_rule: REJECT: decorative gradient/orb/blob/glow layers
verified.reason: Line 4588 literally carries two decorative radial-gradient orb layers on the root div; matches the banned decorative-glow pattern (alpha is subtle but still purely decorative).

verified.old_pattern: absolutely-positioned height:200 div with radial-gradient(ellipse... accent14...) + radial-gradient(ellipse... blue 0.03...) glow behind header
verified.canonical_replacement: Delete the decorative glow div; header sits on the plain surface
verified.doctrine_rule: REJECT: decorative gradient/orb/blob/glow layers
verified.reason: Line 4626 is an absolute pointerEvents:none div with two radial-gradient ellipse glows purely behind the header — textbook decorative glow layer.

verified.old_pattern: {t.dir === 'up' ? '▲' : '▼'}
verified.canonical_replacement: n/a — no fitting signal-language primitive for a fundamental-ratio improvement arrow
verified.doctrine_rule: Custom ▲▼ direction encoders must use signal-language primitives
verified.reason: This ▲▼ encodes fundamental-ratio improvement (good=green/bad=red, a correct health semantic), not buy/sell market direction; VerdictGlyph (signal verdict) and BigDirectionGlyph (buy/sell) are semantic misfits, and the arrow shape already gives a non-color cue.

verified.old_pattern: {periodReturn >= 0 ? '▲' : '▼'} inside the period-return pill
verified.canonical_replacement: n/a — no signal-language primitive encodes a P&L return sign
verified.doctrine_rule: Custom ▲▼ direction encoders must use signal-language primitives
verified.reason: The ▲▼ encodes the sign of a price return (P&L gain/loss, green-for-gain is correct), not market direction/verdict; VerdictGlyph/BigDirectionGlyph do not fit, and the arrow itself is a non-color cue.

verified.old_pattern: inline-flex span padding sp('3px 10px'), borderRadius RADII.lg, background toneAlpha(green/red,0.10), color retColor — hand-rolled return chip
verified.canonical_replacement: MetricChip (or Pill) primitive with directional/P&L tone
verified.doctrine_rule: Hand-rolling Pill/MetricChip (rounded padded bg/fg status chip)
verified.reason: Line 1326 is a hand-rolled rounded padded bg/fg chip duplicating MetricChip/Pill (both exist in primitives.jsx); the green/red is P&L-correct, but the chip itself is hand-rolled.

verified.old_pattern: inline-flex span (padding sp('2px 8px'), borderRadius, bg/fg) + 5px dot with animation 'researchObservatoryPulse 1.8s ease-in-out infinite'
verified.canonical_replacement: StatusPill primitive (live/error/pending) with its canonical status dot
verified.doctrine_rule: Hand-rolling StatusPill; infinite pulse lacks prefers-reduced-motion guard
verified.reason: Lines 1343-1344 hand-roll an operational status pill + infinitely pulsing dot (keyframe at 4621 has no prefers-reduced-motion guard); StatusPill exists in primitives.jsx (line 805).

verified.old_pattern: div style={{background: CSS_COLOR.bg1, border: `1px solid ${CSS_COLOR.border}`, borderRadius: RADII.sm, padding}} with label + value + spark
verified.canonical_replacement: StatTile primitive (or surfaceStyle()/Card) for the KPI tile
verified.doctrine_rule: Ad-hoc KPI tile + inline surface styling instead of StatTile / surfaceStyle()
verified.reason: Line 1052 is an inline-styled surface (bg1/border/radius/padding) holding label+value+TrendSpark — an ad-hoc KPI tile; StatTile exists in primitives.jsx (line 925).

verified.old_pattern: loading placeholder divs with linear-gradient(90deg, text0.025 ... text0.055 ...), backgroundSize 220px, animation 'shimmer 1.6s linear infinite'
verified.canonical_replacement: Skeleton / ChartSkeleton primitive for the loading placeholders
verified.doctrine_rule: Hand-rolled shimmer loader instead of Skeleton/ChartSkeleton; infinite shimmer ignores prefers-reduced-motion
verified.reason: Lines 4262-4272 hand-roll gradient shimmer placeholder blocks with 'shimmer ... infinite' (no reduced-motion guard); Skeleton (1714) and ChartSkeleton (1756) exist in primitives.jsx.

verified.old_pattern: icon: '◆' in FALLBACK_THEME (unicode glyph), rendered decoratively at fontSize 48 / opacity 0.4 (line 4772)
verified.canonical_replacement: Icon primitive — but note theme.icon is a per-theme data field, so this is not a clean single-site swap
verified.doctrine_rule: Raw emoji/unicode glyph used as decoration instead of Icon primitive
verified.reason: ◆ is rendered decoratively at 48px/0.4 opacity (line 4772), matching the marker, but it is a per-theme data field (other themes supply their own icon strings), so replacing only the fallback with the Icon primitive would be inconsistent with the data-driven icon system.

verified.old_pattern: color: #2962ff; alongside #16151A/#86837D/#ffffff literals in the widget stylesheet
verified.canonical_replacement: n/a — vendor widget chrome; #2962ff is TradingView's brand link color, not a PYRUS surface token
verified.doctrine_rule: HUNT MARKER: raw hex color literals instead of design tokens
verified.reason: These hex literals style the third-party TradingView embed iframe chrome (copyright/attribution link), where #2962ff is TradingView's own brand blue; this is vendor widget markup, not a PYRUS-designed surface, so design tokens do not apply.

verified.old_pattern: const SignalActionStatusPill = ... <span style={{ display:'inline-flex', borderRadius: dim(RADII.pill), border: `1px solid ${cssColorAlpha(tone,'44')}`, background: cssColorAlpha(tone,'18'), color: tone, ...ready glow via '--ra-glow-tone' + GLOW.sm }}>
verified.canonical_replacement: StatusPill (components/platform/primitives.jsx) with color=tone, glow={statusMeta.ready}, dot={false}, and VerdictGlyph+label passed as children
verified.doctrine_rule: Pill/StatusPill primitive replaces hand-rolled rounded-full tone-tinted status chips
verified.reason: Hand-rolls the exact StatusPill pattern — pill radius, tone-alpha border/bg, and the same '--ra-glow-tone'+GLOW.sm glow channel StatusPill exposes via its glow prop; only difference is a VerdictGlyph in place of the dot, which fits StatusPill's children slot.

verified.old_pattern: const SignalActionMetaCell = ... <span style={{ display:'grid', border: `1px solid ${CSS_COLOR.borderLight}`, borderRadius: dim(RADII.xs), background: CSS_COLOR.bg1, ... }}> uppercase textMuted label + toned tabular value
verified.canonical_replacement: MetricChip (components/platform/primitives.jsx) with label, value, tone, and tabular value (MetricChip already renders uppercase muted label + tone-mixed border/bg + tabular-nums value)
verified.doctrine_rule: MetricChip primitive replaces ad-hoc label/value metric chips with inline surface styling
verified.reason: MetricChip is a near-exact match: same uppercase textMuted label, tone-colored tabular-nums value, and tone-mixed border/background — this cell reimplements it inline.

verified.old_pattern: local const THEME = { bg0:"#16151A", border:"#2F2E35", green:"#4FB286", red:"#EA5E5B", amber:"#D9A864", accent:"#E08F76", ... } raw-hex palette copy
verified.canonical_replacement: Import CSS_COLOR from ../../lib/uiTokens.jsx (file already imports RADII/FONT_WEIGHTS from it; CSS_COLOR carries matching bg0-4/border/text/accent/green/red/amber/purple tokens) instead of re-declaring a raw-hex palette.
verified.doctrine_rule: HUNT MARKERS: raw hex (#rrggbb) literals; canonical tokens live in uiTokens/primitives, not per-file THEME copies
verified.reason: Raw-hex THEME block exists at lines 37-57 and CSS_COLOR in uiTokens.jsx exposes equivalent semantic tokens; the same file already imports from uiTokens.

verified.old_pattern: ["desktop","narrow"].map((mode)=> <button aria-pressed={active} style={{...BUTTON_BASE, background: active?THEME.amber:THEME.bg3,...}}>) hand-rolled mutually-exclusive toggle group
verified.canonical_replacement: SegmentedControl from components/platform/primitives.jsx (single-select layout-mode switch is exactly its job).
verified.doctrine_rule: CANONICAL PRIMITIVES: SegmentedControl replaces raw toggle/button styling
verified.reason: Lines 387-407 are a single-select layout toggle built from raw buttons; SegmentedControl exists at primitives.jsx:1273.

verified.old_pattern: color: active ? "#16151A" : THEME.textDim
verified.canonical_replacement: CSS_COLOR.bg0 token (same #16151A defined as THEME.bg0 -> var(--ra-surface-0)) rather than an inline raw hex literal.
verified.doctrine_rule: HUNT MARKERS: raw hex (#rrggbb) literal inline
verified.reason: Inline #16151A present at line 400; it equals THEME.bg0 which maps to CSS_COLOR.bg0 (var(--ra-surface-0)).

verified.old_pattern: const LevelPill = ({level}) => {level}
verified.canonical_replacement: StatusPill from components/platform/primitives.jsx (operational green/amber/red pressure level is a canonical status pill), passing color=pressureTone(level).
verified.doctrine_rule: CANONICAL PRIMITIVES: StatusPill/Pill replaces raw <span> rounded status chips
verified.reason: LevelPill at lines 694-709 is a raw rounded status span for an operational level; StatusPill (primitives.jsx:805) accepts a semantic color prop for exactly this.

verified.old_pattern:
Status: {latestDiagnostics?.status || "loading"}
Severity: {latestDiagnostics?.severity || "unknown"}
operational status/severity rendered as bare text
verified.canonical_replacement: StatusPill / SeverityRail (only if made primitive-safe); as a root crash boundary this file intentionally avoids importing primitives.jsx, so bare text is correct-by-design.
verified.doctrine_rule: STATE COVERAGE / CANONICAL PRIMITIVES: operational status+severity should use StatusPill/SeverityRail, not bare text
verified.reason: File imports only typography/workspaceStorage/lucide (never primitives.jsx); a crash fallback must survive a primitives-module crash, so bare text is deliberate and not a real violation.

verified.old_pattern: const buttonStyle = { border:"1px solid rgba(232,229,222,0.24)", background:"#232227", color:"#F2EFE9", padding:"7px 11px", ... } hand-rolled button + raw hex surface
verified.canonical_replacement: Button primitive / surfaceStyle() (only if made primitive-safe); crash boundary is intentionally primitive-free for resilience, so this is acceptable-by-design.
verified.doctrine_rule: HUNT MARKERS: raw hex + inline surface styling vs surfaceStyle/primitives
verified.reason: Same crash-boundary file deliberately avoids primitives.jsx; a self-contained button style is required so the fallback renders even if primitives are part of the crash.

verified.old_pattern: {favorite ? "★" : "☆"} (raw unicode star as the favorite toggle)
verified.canonical_replacement: Use the Icon primitive (components/platform/primitives.jsx:1228, <Icon as={Star} .../> with filled state) for the favorite affordance, with an explicit aria-label/title on the control
verified.doctrine_rule: Icon replaces raw glyph/emoji used as affordance/status; icon-only controls need label/tooltip (A11Y)
verified.reason: Raw ★/☆ unicode chars used as the interactive favorite toggle at line 642; Icon primitive exists (line 1228, takes lucide `as` component like Star), and the role=button span has no aria-label.

verified.old_pattern: <select aria-label="SnapTrade broker target" style={{height,border,borderRadius,background,color,fontFamily,fontSize,padding}}> (hand-rolled inline-styled select)
verified.canonical_replacement: Use the canonical Select primitive (components/platform/primitives.jsx:1563) instead of a raw inline-styled <select>
verified.doctrine_rule: Select primitive replaces raw <select> styling
verified.reason: Raw <select> at line 779 hand-rolls border/borderRadius/background/color/padding inline; canonical Select primitive confirmed exported at primitives.jsx:1563 with equivalent options/label/size API.

verified.old_pattern: inline-styled action <button> with padding/border/borderRadius/background/color tone tokens duplicating the primary/secondary button pattern
verified.canonical_replacement: Use the canonical Button primitive (components/ui/Button.jsx:99) with its variant/tone props rather than re-implementing button chrome inline
verified.doctrine_rule: Button primitive replaces hand-rolled button styling
verified.reason: BrokerActionButton (starts line 226) hand-rolls border/background/color chrome inline with its own primary/secondary variant + tone props, exactly duplicating the Button primitive confirmed at components/ui/Button.jsx:99.

verified.old_pattern: StatusBadge helper (defined at 1057): hand-rolled <span> with borderRadius RADII.pill + cssColorAlpha border/bg + inner <span borderRadius:'50%'> dot + ra-status-pulse
verified.canonical_replacement: StatusPill (primitives.jsx:805) — provides the pill + optional dot; drop local StatusBadge
verified.doctrine_rule: StatusPill/Pill/Badge replaces raw rounded-full pill spans encoding status
verified.reason: Hand-rolled status pill + dot + pulse is real at 1057; StatusPill exists (dot built-in; glow is the status channel in place of the raw ra-status-pulse).

verified.old_pattern: MetricCard: ad-hoc KPI tile div (label fs9 + value fs16 mono accent) built inline
verified.canonical_replacement: StatTile (primitives.jsx:925)
verified.doctrine_rule: StatTile replaces ad-hoc KPI tiles
verified.reason: MetricCard at 1102 is an inline label/value KPI tile; StatTile primitive exists and covers this exact case.

verified.old_pattern: inputStyle() helper (892) + raw <input> in BacktestTradeSearchInput (922) styled with border/bg/mono inline
verified.canonical_replacement: TextField (primitives.jsx:1411)
verified.doctrine_rule: TextField replaces raw <input> + inline input styling
verified.reason: inputStyle() at 892 and a raw <input style={inputStyle}> at 922 are real; TextField primitive exists.

verified.old_pattern: cardStyle() returns inline {background: theme.bg2, boxShadow: var(--ra-edge-top), padding}
verified.canonical_replacement: surfaceStyle() (primitives.jsx:1882) / Card (1894) / SurfacePanel (1929)
verified.doctrine_rule: surfaceStyle()/Card replaces inline bg-/border-/shadow surface styling
verified.reason: cardStyle() at 962 is an inline surface (bg2 + edge shadow + padding); surfaceStyle()/Card primitives exist.

verified.old_pattern: const color = ... : '#ffffff' — raw hex for on-accent button text
verified.canonical_replacement: CSS_COLOR.onAccent (corrected: theme.onAccent does NOT exist on the local ThemeTokens type; CSS_COLOR.onAccent is the token the sibling file uses at line 111)
verified.doctrine_rule: on-accent color via token, no raw #rrggbb literals
verified.reason: Raw '#ffffff' at 944 is real; corrected the replacement — ThemeTokens (111-136) has no onAccent field, so use CSS_COLOR.onAccent as the sibling PatternDiscoveryPanel does.

verified.old_pattern: DraftStrategiesList empty state: dashed-border div with bare 'No promoted draft strategies yet.' — no recovery affordance
verified.canonical_replacement: DataUnavailableState (primitives.jsx:1068; already imported at line 106)
verified.doctrine_rule: empty states need context + recovery via DataUnavailableState
verified.reason: Bare dashed empty div at 1159-1174 with no recovery; DataUnavailableState is imported (106) and used elsewhere (2912) but not here.

verified.old_pattern: StatusBadge: hand-rolled pill span (RADII.pill, cssColorAlpha bg/border) + inner borderRadius:'50%' dot + ra-status-pulse
verified.canonical_replacement: StatusPill (primitives.jsx:805)
verified.doctrine_rule: StatusPill replaces hand-rolled status pill + status dot
verified.reason: StatusBadge at 201 is a hand-rolled status pill + dot + pulse; StatusPill primitive exists.

verified.old_pattern: FamilyChip (298) and sibling BiasChip (~251): hand-rolled rounded-full pill spans with cssColorAlpha tone bg/border, uppercase
verified.canonical_replacement: Pill / Badge (primitives.jsx:747/782) or StrategyTag (signal-language/StrategyTag.jsx)
verified.doctrine_rule: Pill/Badge/StrategyTag replaces raw rounded-full label/metric chip spans
verified.reason: FamilyChip (298) is a hand-rolled RADII.pill chip encoding family identity; Pill/Badge/StrategyTag exist (line ~255 is BiasChip, also hand-rolled).

verified.old_pattern: raw <select multiple> (1856) and raw <input> (1887-1941) styled with shared inputStyle const, despite Select imported (44)
verified.canonical_replacement: Select (primitives.jsx:1563) for the dropdown; TextField (1411) for the inputs
verified.doctrine_rule: Select/TextField replace raw <select>/<input> + inline styling
verified.reason: Raw <select multiple> at 1856 and raw <input style={inputStyle}> at 1887-1941 are real; Select is already used for single-selects (1834/1902) and TextField exists (multi-select caveat: Select may need a multiple variant, but the raw inputs clearly warrant TextField).

verified.old_pattern: cardStyle const {bg2, border, radius, padding} (128) + SectionCard wrapper (144) hand-roll surfaces
verified.canonical_replacement: surfaceStyle() (1882) / Card (1894) / SurfacePanel (1929) with CardTitle (2375)
verified.doctrine_rule: surfaceStyle()/Card replaces inline surface styling and cards-in-cards
verified.reason: cardStyle const at 128 is a full inline surface (bg2+border+radius+padding) driving the SectionCard wrapper; surfaceStyle/Card/SurfacePanel primitives exist.

verified.old_pattern: EmptyInline: dashed-border centered div rendering a bare detail string, no recovery affordance
verified.canonical_replacement: DataUnavailableState (primitives.jsx:1068; needs import)
verified.doctrine_rule: empty states need context + recovery via DataUnavailableState
verified.reason: EmptyInline at 2348 is a bare dashed div showing only {detail}; DataUnavailableState exists (not yet imported in this file).

verified.old_pattern: familyTone(): fast_bullish_reversal -> cyan, fast_bearish_reversal -> amber
verified.canonical_replacement: blue for bullish-reversal / red for bearish-reversal
verified.doctrine_rule: semantic direction color: blue=bullish, red=bearish
verified.reason: Not the banned green-for-direction; cyan/amber are family-identity tones distinguishing reversal vs confluence, and the proposed blue/red would collide with bull_confluence=blue and bear_confluence=red, destroying distinguishability — this is a deliberate variant palette, not a hand-rolled primitive.
